title: NetApp’s 2023 Cloud Complexity Report Highlights the Shifting Demands of a Multicloud Environment
text: Key findings indicate that 98% of technology leaders have been impacted by the increasing complexity of the cloud, bringing issues of cybersecurity and cost optimization to the forefront SAN JOSE, Calif.–(BUSINESS WIRE)–NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), a global, cloud-led, data-centric software company, today released the 2023 Cloud Complexity Report, a global survey exploring how technology decision makers […]...

title: NetApp's 2023 Cloud Complexity Report Highlights the Shifting Demands of a Multicloud Environment
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), a global, cloud-led, data-centric software company, today released the 2023 Cloud Complexity Report, a global survey exploring how technology decision makers are navigating cloud requirements coming from digital transformation and AI initiatives and the complexity of multicloud environments.

title: 3 Storage Devices Stocks to Look For Amid Industry Weakness
text: Despite macroeconomic headwinds and supply chain troubles, momentum in cloud computing, IoT, auto, connected devices, VR and AI will likely favor the prospects of the Zacks Computer - Storage Devices industry players like NTAP, PSTG and TDC.

title: NetApp (NTAP) & CGI to Aid Clients Unlock Cloud Potential
text: NetApp (NTAP) and CGI collaborate to offer hybrid cloud-managed services that will help clients improve their operational efficiency and transform their data.

title: CGI partners with NetApp to help clients accelerate data-intensive digital transformation in the cloud
text: Stock Market Symbols GIB.A (TSX) GIB (NYSE) cgi.com/newsroom MONTRÉAL, March 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ - CGI (NYSE: GIB) (TSX: GIB.A) today announced a new global alliance partnership with NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP) focused on helping organizations across industry sectors unlock the full potential of hybrid and multi-cloud environments to drive flexibility, efficiencies and cost savings in the management of their applications and use of their data. Through this new alliance, CGI and NetApp will provide clients with a single, consistent cloud environment, unified data services, and centralized management that supports full visibility of both on-premise and cloud-based systems and data.

title: NetApp to Participate in Upcoming Technology Conference
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NetApp™ (NASDAQ: NTAP), a global, cloud-led, data-centric software company, today announced the Company will participate in a fireside chat at the following conference: Morgan Stanley TMT Conference Mike Berry, EVP, finance and CFO March 7, 2023 9:10 – 9:40 a.m. Pacific Time A live audio Webcast of the presentation will be available at investors.netapp.com. An audio Webcast archive of each event will be available after the conferences.
